{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324012103222B99C9A727A72CE0AE"}"},"total":1720},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608780321093600062","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"封神台外的野望：当洪荒小说跳出既定框架的尝试与遗憾
在洪荒流小说泛滥的当下，《封神：阐教全上榜，元始心态崩了》以其独特的切入角度在众多作品中脱颖而出。主角穿越成商朝大将张桂芳，这一设定本身就打破了常规——我们见惯了穿越成姜子牙、杨戬、哪吒的主角，却鲜有人选择站在商纣阵营。这个看似不起眼的创新，恰恰为作品注入了最初的活力。
小说前期最大的亮点在于系统设定与封神世界的巧妙融合。通过系统任务推动剧情，主角张桂芳一步步改变封神走势，让原本应该上榜的阐教仙人纷纷落马，直击书名中“元始心态崩了”的核心爽点。这种反套路的叙事策略精准抓住了读者心理——我们早已厌倦了照本宣科的封神演绎，渴望看到既定命运的颠覆。当熟悉的封神战役因主角介入而走向不同结局，那种新鲜感与颠覆快感确实令人眼前一亮。
可惜的是，当故事推进至封神量劫之后的西游量劫时，原本精心编织的叙事突然变得仓促而粗糙。作者似乎急于收尾，西游量劫的处理如同走马观花，缺少了封神部分那种细腻的命运交织感。这种前后质量的巨大落差，不禁让人怀疑是否是创作精力分配不均，或是大纲设定本就头重脚轻。量劫之间的承接本应是展现世界观的绝佳机会，却成了叙事的薄弱环节，实属遗憾。
值得一提的是，小说结尾关于三千魔神的描写为整体质量挽回了一些分数。这一设定将视野从单纯的人教之争提升到了宇宙洪荒的宏观格局，为主角的穿越命运增添了宿命感与史诗感。魔神的存在模糊了正邪界限，让读者重新思考封神世界中所谓的“天命”究竟为何物。
总的来看，这部作品犹如它的核心设定——有颠覆的野心，却也在传统叙事的惯性中迷失了方向。它让我们看到，洪荒小说的创新空间依然广阔，但也提醒我们，颠覆传统容易，构建完整的新世界却需要持之以恒的匠心。或许，这正是当下网络文学创作的缩影：灵光一闪的创意能够吸引眼球，但真正成就经典的，是那份贯穿始终的打磨与坚持。","text_exts":[{"e":84,"s":82,"text":"大将","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774286464A72CE0AE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227608780321093600062%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227135257214591175720%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771559403,"group_id":"7135257214591175720","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9FKSqia++Afzf/HEY1vzBpoy4+yQfK4m7C1B2Oxu3/l","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1267086555625144","user_name":"萌城小可爱的唯一"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1267086555625144","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7135257214591175720","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越洪荒封神时期，成为征讨西岐第一人，青龙关守将张桂芳！
　　在这危险的洪荒世界，你让我一个小小的凡人武将，怎么活下去！
　　好在，最强赏金魂系统激活，只要战斗，就能不断变强，累积连胜，更能爆出丰厚奖励！
　　【叮，恭喜你获得一连胜，奖励小神通摄魂，检测到当前为首胜，额外获得首胜宝箱x1】
　　【叮，恭喜你获得三十七连胜，奖励后天功德至宝鸿蒙量天尺！】
　　【叮，恭喜你获得一百连胜，奖励混沌至宝混沌珠！】
　　【叮，恭喜你获得一千连胜，你已经超脱鸿蒙】
　　.........
　　等到封神大劫时期彻底爆发之时，看着暴揍诸圣，堵门紫霄宫的张桂芳，所有人全部都震惊了！
　　让你征讨西岐，你堵门六圣鸿钧？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d4c1a7269c2d1fe2594931cd5e9f4848","author":"喜之郎cc爽","author_id":"","book_id":"7135257214591175720","book_name":"封神：阐教全上榜，元始心态崩了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7135271001553633827","read_count":"36965","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1010087"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"482","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空,东方玄幻,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/980ce19be643480b09f85bdbf890516d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779470464&x-signature=kIcq%2FktoytNSyyPDF%2F%2FP3gr7mpc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"
